headline: NVIDIA Blackwell GPU Demand Signals Shift Toward Massive-Scale Agentic Workflows
news_summary: NVIDIA has reported unprecedented demand for its Blackwell architecture, driven largely by enterprise shifts toward autonomous 'agentic' workflows. Unlike traditional chat-bots, these new systems require massive compute for real-time decision making and multi-step planning. Industry analysts predict that the integration of NIM (NVIDIA Inference Microservices) will be the catalyst for the next wave of global enterprise productivity, enabling thousands of agents to work in parallel on complex business audits and content generation.
